---
title: "Blog posts"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: featured
    contents: featured
    type: grid
    sort: date desc
    max-items: 3
  - id: all-posts
    contents: posts
    type: grid
    sort: date desc
    max-items: 12
    filter-ui: true
---

## ⭐ Featured posts

::: {#featured}
:::

---

## All posts

::: {#all-posts}
:::
